narrative:
Darke-Co municipal court district has 33,439 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -17.4% D−R vs -37.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
